overall.description: First-person gameplay footage in a medieval stone castle interior. The player approaches an NPC named Sahba Norvado, ascends a spiral staircase to investigate a locked wooden door, then returns to the great hall. Warm torchlight illuminates the stone walls and tiled floors.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone great hall with arched windows and warm torchlight

events.description: turns away from the NPC and walks toward the spiral staircase

agents.ego_description: standing in the great hall facing the NPC Sahba Norvado, then turning to walk toward the staircase

notable_agents.action: standing still, facing the player character

entered.detail: tall arched window with decorative stained glass pattern
tall arched window with decorative stained glass pattern

wall-mounted iron torch sconce providing warm illumination

segments.scene_description: The player stands in a spacious stone great hall illuminated by wall sconces, facing the NPC Sahba Norvado. Tall arched windows with stained glass line the walls. The player then turns and begins walking toward a spiral staircase visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed stone spiral staircase with carved railings

events.description: moves from the open great hall into the enclosed spiral stairwell
begins ascending the stone steps of the spiral staircase

agents.ego_description: walking up the narrow stone spiral staircase, following the curved path

entered.detail: winding stone staircase with worn steps ascending upward
decorative carved stone railing along the left side of the stairs
narrow vertical slit window in the thick stone wall

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrow, enclosed spiral stairwell carved from stone. The space is dimly lit with decorative carved railings visible along the left wall. The camera ascends the winding steps, leaving the great hall behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper corridor with locked wooden door and wall torch

events.description: exits the staircase into the upper corridor landing
approaches the locked wooden door and attempts to open it, revealing it requires a key

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper corridor toward the large wooden door, attempting to interact with the lock

entered.detail: heavy wooden door with iron bands and a red lock mechanism labeled as leading to private quarters
lit torch mounted on the corridor wall casting flickering light
decorative stone archway framing the wooden door

segments.scene_description: Reaching the top of the stairs, the player enters a short stone corridor lit by a wall torch. At the end stands a heavy wooden door with iron bands leading to the Scholar's Private Quarters. The player approaches and discovers the door is locked and requires a key.

scene_state.functional_zone: returning to the great hall via the spiral staircase

events.description: turns around away from the locked door to descend
re-enters the spiral staircase to descend back to the main floor
exits the staircase back into the great hall

agents.ego_description: turning back from the locked door and descending the spiral staircase to return to the main hall

notable_agents.action: standing near the staircase entrance as the player returns

entered.detail: re-entering the stone spiral staircase to descend
the stone pillar in the great hall coming back into view

segments.scene_description: Unable to open the locked door, the player turns and descends the spiral staircase back to the great hall. The warm torchlight of the main hall gradually returns as the player exits the stairwell, where the NPC Sahba Norvado remains standing near the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a grand, light-filled hall into the claustrophobic depths of a stone tower before returning to the starting point. It begins in a spacious great hall illuminated by wall sconces and stained glass windows, where the camera turns away from the NPC Sahba Norvado to approach a spiral staircase. As the camera enters the narrow stairwell, the environment shifts to a dimly lit, enclosed space with carved railings that wind upward, leaving the openness of the hall behind. The scene then opens into a short stone corridor lit by a single torch, leading the camera toward a heavy, iron-banded wooden door that is found to be locked. Finally, the camera turns and descends the winding steps, with the dimness of the tower gradually giving way to the warm torchlight of the great hall as Sahba Norvado comes back into view.
